title: Peramium secundum
intro:

Xiang Fu, also known as Pericarpium Citrinum, is a plant derived from the dried fruit of the Citrus reticulata or Citrus aurantium var. bergamia, used in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Xiang Fu include its use to relieve digestive issues, such as constipation and abdominal distension, as well as to treat respiratory problems, such as cough and bronchitis. The bioactive constituents of Xiang Fu include coumarins, flavonoids, and volatile oils, including limonene and geraniol. Xiang Fu is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to make herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to treat digestive and respiratory issues.
